tickets.title: Define CFK adoption target architecture
tickets.notes: Baseline architecture for Confluent for Kubernetes on the platform cluster.

tickets.title: Inventory current Kafka workloads
tickets.notes: List brokers, topics, connectors, clients, owners, and deployment patterns.

tickets.title: Document CFK operator prerequisites
tickets.notes: Capture CRDs, storage classes, networking, DNS, TLS, and RBAC needs.

tickets.title: Select CFK version and support matrix
tickets.notes: Pin the target CFK and Confluent Platform versions for the demo.

tickets.title: Create Kubernetes namespaces for Kafka domains
tickets.notes: Define namespaces for platform, dev, and shared observability.

tickets.title: Prepare storage class guidance for brokers
tickets.notes: Validate persistent volume settings for broker durability.

tickets.title: Model broker rack awareness
tickets.notes: Document rack labels and anti-affinity expectations.

tickets.title: Define Kafka listener strategy
tickets.notes: Internal, external, and inter-broker listener plan.

tickets.title: Create CFK install runbook
tickets.notes: Operator install, CRDs, Helm values, and smoke checks.

tickets.title: Bootstrap CFK operator in dev namespace
tickets.notes: Install CFK operator for first controlled demo environment.

tickets.title: Create Kafka CR for dev cluster
tickets.notes: Deploy the first Kafka custom resource under CFK control.

tickets.title: Configure ZooKeeper or KRaft mode decision
tickets.notes: Confirm runtime mode and upgrade implications.

tickets.title: Define TLS certificate approach for Kafka listeners
tickets.notes: Waiting on certificate ownership and secret propagation decision.

tickets.title: Map secret management for CFK resources
tickets.notes: Document secret ownership for credentials, TLS, and license material.

tickets.title: Create KafkaUser examples
tickets.notes: Example users for app teams and service accounts.

tickets.title: Create KafkaTopic examples
tickets.notes: Topic manifests for onboarding and validation flows.

tickets.title: Define RBAC for app team namespaces
tickets.notes: Separate platform operator power from app team self-service.

tickets.title: Build platform observability dashboard
tickets.notes: Broker, controller, topic, and consumer lag dashboard.

tickets.title: Wire CFK metrics into Prometheus
tickets.notes: ServiceMonitors and scrape targets for operator and cluster metrics.

tickets.title: Create alert rules for Kafka health
tickets.notes: ISR shrink, offline partitions, under replicated partitions, and disk alerts.

tickets.title: Define backup and restore expectations
tickets.notes: Document what is backed up and what is recreated declaratively.

tickets.title: Build test producer and consumer workload
tickets.notes: Smoke workload for end-to-end message flow.

tickets.title: Create schema registry CR
tickets.notes: Deploy Schema Registry managed by CFK.

tickets.title: Create Kafka Connect CR
tickets.notes: Deploy Kafka Connect and plugin strategy.

tickets.title: Create sample connector deployment
tickets.notes: Use a harmless source/sink connector for demo validation.

tickets.title: Model connector secret injection
tickets.notes: Show connector credentials without hardcoding secrets.

tickets.title: Define environment promotion workflow
tickets.notes: Promotion from dev to shared demo and then production-like namespaces.

tickets.title: Create GitOps layout for CFK manifests
tickets.notes: Folder boundaries, ownership, and review flow.

tickets.title: Add policy checks for KafkaTopic changes
tickets.notes: Guard partitions, replication factor, retention, and cleanup policy.

tickets.title: Define quota model for app teams
tickets.notes: Produce, consume, and storage quota shape.

tickets.title: Create migration plan from manual Kafka
tickets.notes: High-level migration from current platform to CFK-managed resources.

tickets.title: Map existing topics to CFK manifests
tickets.notes: Convert current topic state into declarative resources.

tickets.title: Plan broker rolling restart validation
tickets.notes: Verify availability during CFK-controlled rolling operations.

tickets.title: Test broker scale up and scale down
tickets.notes: Capacity and rebalance behavior.

tickets.title: Validate client compatibility
tickets.notes: Kafka client versions and auth/TLS expectations.

tickets.title: Prepare developer onboarding guide
tickets.notes: How app teams request topics, users, and connector changes.

tickets.title: Create demo board and dependency map
tickets.notes: MapFlow board for visual planning and dependency conversation.

tickets.title: Run failure drill for broker pod deletion
tickets.notes: Confirm operator recovery and alert behavior.

tickets.title: Capture acceptance criteria for CFK MVP
tickets.notes: Definition of done for demo and MVP readiness.

tickets.title: Publish CFK adoption demo summary
tickets.notes: Summarize the adoption plan, risks, and next steps.
